title: dbms ri
text: dbms ri Enable Sybase referential integrity controls. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = dbms ri Description By default referential integrity controls are enforced by Uniface. Setting the dbms ri connector option enables Sybase referential integrity controls. With this option set and if an overflow table exists Uniface relies on the Sybase DBMS to delete the overflow rows. These deletions are performed by the cascading delete controls in the DBMS. When the dbms ri connector option is not set, default referential integrity controls are enforced by Uniface and during data conversion, if a row already exists, Uniface deletes the row and any associated overflow table row and then inserts the new row.
